untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection requires trend line identification (horizontal support and up-sloping resistance) which cannot be expressed using point-in-time indicator values. Megaphone patterns require multi-bar geometric analysis of pivot points, slope angles, and volatility expansion that exceed the capabilities of standard technical indicators. The signal also specifies 'two minor low touches' and 'two minor highs' requiring pattern recognition beyond allowed operators.
translation_notes: Attempted breakout-based approximation using volume expansion and price action, but this does NOT capture the core megaphone pattern logic. Author-silent exit conditions replaced with reversal logic. Recommend implementing custom pattern detection logic outside standard indicator framework.
